description: Google Tag Manager + read-only GA4 MCP server. Read-only by default, gated writes, audits.
name: io.github.samarthanalytics-sj/samarth-gtm-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (Desktop app type)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow create/update operations (default: read-only)
environmentVariables.name: GTM_MCP_ENABLE_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow publish operations (default: disabled)
environmentVariables.name: GTM_MCP_ENABLE_PUBLISH

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow delete operations (default: disabled)
environmentVariables.name: GTM_MCP_ENABLE_DELETES
